word: G3831 - πανήγυρις - panḗgyris - pan-ay'-goo-ris - General assembly

sections.paragraph:
- Original: πανήγυρις

- Transliteration: Paneguris

- Phonetic: pan-ay'-goo-ris

- Definition:

1. a festal gathering of the whole people to celebrate public games or other solemnities

2. a public festal assembly

- Origin: from G3956 and a derivative of G58

- TDNT entry: 17:02,8

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: From G3956 and a derivative of G58; a mass meeting that is (figuratively) universal companionship: - general assembly.
